description: The Governed721 organization governs a Governed721 NFT contract (deployed at 0xA69300486514ae20Dd987eB30c736f4F682e2275) and manages the distribution of royalties in this collection of NFTs. Three types of stakeholders - Artists, Owners and Operators - decide on how revenues from resale of artists are distributed. Together, they elect executive that are responsible for enforcement of split payments by blacklisting any account that is deemed non-compliant.
